name: AMPATH POC Age Friendly Prioritization Tool v1.0

sections.label: Activities Of Daily Living (ADL)- Independence (No supervision, direction or personal assistance)= 1 point. Dependence (With supervision, direction, personal assistance or total care) = 0 point.

questions.label: Bathing:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Bathes self completely or needs help bathing single part of the body. 0 point - Need help with bathing more than one part of the body

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Bathes self completely or needs help bathing single part of the body. 0 point - Need help with bathing more than one part of the body

questions.label: Dressing:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Gets clothes form closet and drawers and puts on clothes complete with fasteners. 0 point - Needs help with dressing self or needs to be completely dressed

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Gets clothes form closet and drawers and puts on clothes complete with fasteners. 0 point - Needs help with dressing self or needs to be completely dressed.

questions.label: Toileting:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Goes to toilet, gets on and off, arranges clothes, cleans genital area without help. 0 point - Needs help transferring to the toilet, cleaning self or uses bedpan or commode

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Goes to toilet, gets on and off, arranges clothes, cleans genital area without help. 0 point - Needs help transferring to the toilet, cleaning self or uses bedpan or commode

questions.label: Transferring:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Moves in and out of bed or chair unassisted. Mechanical transfer aids are acceptable. 0 point - Needs help in moving from bed to chair or requires a complete transfer.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Moves in and out of bed or chair unassisted. Mechanical transfer aids are acceptable. 0 point - Needs help in moving from bed to chair or requires a complete transfer.

questions.label: Continence:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Exercises complete self control over urination and defecation. 0 point - Is partially or totally incontinent of bowel or bladder.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Exercises complete self control over urination and defecation. 0 point - Is partially or totally incontinent of bowel or bladder.

questions.label: Feeding:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Gets food from plate into mouth without help. Preparation of food may be done by another person. 0 point - Needs partial ot total help with feeding or requires parenteral feeding.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Gets food from plate into mouth without help. Preparation of food may be done by another person. 0 point - Needs partial ot total help with feeding or requires parenteral feeding.

calculate.calculateExpression: isNaN(parseFloat(bathing) + parseFloat(dressing) + parseFloat(toileting) + parseFloat(transferring) + parseFloat(continence) + parseFloat(feeding)) ? undefined: (parseFloat(bathing) + parseFloat(dressing) + parseFloat(toileting) + parseFloat(transferring) + parseFloat(continence) + parseFloat(feeding))

sections.label: Instrumental Activities Of Daily Living Scale (IADL)

questions.label: Ability to use telephone:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Operates telephone on own initiative- looks up and dials numbers etc. 0 point - Does not use telephone at all

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Operates telephone on own initiative- looks up and dials numbers etc. 0 point - Does not use telephone at all

questions.label: Shopping:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Takes care of all shopping needs independently. 0 point - Completely unable to shop

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Takes care of all shopping needs independently. 0 point - Completely unable to shop

questions.label: Food preparation:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Plans, prepares and serves adequate meals independently. 0 point - Needs to have meals prepared and served

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Plans, prepares and serves adequate meals independently. 0 point - Needs to have meals prepared and served

questions.label: Housekeeping:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Able to manage housekeeping, domestic tasks, dishwashing, bed making and general home maintenance. 0 point - Does not participate in any housekeeping tasks.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Able to manage housekeeping, domestic tasks, dishwashing, bed making and general home maintenance. 0 point - Does not participate in any housekeeping tasks.

questions.label: Laundry:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Does personal laundry completely(Can launder when house help is not there. 0 point - All laundry must be done by others.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Does personal laundry completely(Can launder when house help is not there. 0 point - All laundry must be done by others.

questions.label: Mode of transportation:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point -Travels independently on public transportation, drives own car or arranges travel via taxi. 0 point -Accompanied by someone to places/cannot travel alone to places or cannot travel at all.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point -Travels independently on public transportation, drives own car or arranges travel via taxi. 0 point -Accompanied by someone to places/cannot travel alone to places or cannot travel at all.

questions.label: Responsibility for own medications:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Is responsible for taking medication in correct dosages at correct time. 0 point -Is not capable of dispensing own medication/requires support in prepating medication in advance.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Is responsible for taking medication in correct dosages at correct time. 0 point -Is not capable of dispensing own medication/requires support in prepating medication in advance.

questions.label: Ability to handle finances:
questions.questionInfo: 1 point - Manages financial matters independently (budgets, writes checks, pays rent, goes to bank), collects and keeps track of income. 0 point -Is not capable of managing financial matters independently.

questionOptions.placeholder: 1 point - Manages financial matters independently (budgets, writes checks, pays rent, goes to bank), collects and keeps track of income. 0 point -Is not capable of managing financial matters independently.

calculate.calculateExpression: isNaN(parseFloat(usePhone)+ parseFloat(shopping)+ parseFloat(foodPreparation)+ parseFloat(housekeeping)+ parseFloat(laundry)+ parseFloat(modeTransport)+ parseFloat(ownMeds)+ parseFloat(finances)) ? undefined: (parseFloat(usePhone)+ parseFloat(shopping)+ parseFloat(foodPreparation)+ parseFloat(housekeeping)+ parseFloat(laundry)+ parseFloat(modeTransport)+ parseFloat(ownMeds)+ parseFloat(finances))

(isNaN(parseFloat(usePhone)) ? 0 : parseFloat(usePhone)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(shopping)) ? 0 : parseFloat(shopping)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(foodPreparation)) ? 0 : parseFloat(foodPreparation)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(housekeeping)) ? 0 : parseFloat(housekeeping)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(laundry)) ? 0 : parseFloat(laundry)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(modeTransport)) ? 0 : parseFloat(modeTransport)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(ownMeds)) ? 0 : parseFloat(ownMeds)) + (isNaN(parseFloat(finances)) ? 0 : parseFloat(finances))

sections.label: Cognitive Decline - Ask the client to remember these 3 words which you will ask later (Chicken, Flower, Shop)

questions.label: Orientation in time and space: Time?(Day, Month, Year), Space?(Clinic, Hospital, Home etc):
questions.questionInfo: Correct on both questions = 1 point. Wrong on either questions = 0 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Correct on both questions = 1 point. Wrong on either questions = 0 point

questions.label: Assess abilty to recall the 3 words:
questions.questionInfo: Can recall all or can recall 2 = 1 point. Can recall 1 or cannot recall any = 0 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Can recall all or can recall 2 = 1 point. Can recall 1 or cannot recall any = 0 point

questions.label: Chair rise test: Rise from chair 5 times within 14 secs. Did the person complete 4-5 chair rises within 14 secs?
questions.questionInfo: 4-5 rises = 1 point, 0-3 rises = 0 point

questionOptions.placeholder: 4-5 rises = 1 point, 0-3 rises = 0 point

questions.label: Have you fallen in the past 6 months?
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: Fatigue: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks did you feel tired?
questions.questionInfo: All the time, Most of the time = 0 point. Some of the time, A little of the time, None of the time = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: All the time, Most of the time = 0 point. Some of the time, A little of the time, None of the time = 1 point

questions.label: Have you unintentionally lost weight of more than 3 kg in the last 3 months ?(Check patient chart):
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: Have you experienced loss of appetite?
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: Has food intake declined over the past 3 months?
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: Do you have any problems with your eyes; difficulties in seeing far, seeing near, reading or have eye disease:
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

sections.label: Hearing loss (Conduct a hand rub test from a distance of a meter away from both sides of the ears, each one at a time)

questions.label: Hears (Hand rub test):
questions.questionInfo: Fail on either ear = 0 point. Fail on none = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Fail on either ear = 0 point. Fail on none = 1 point

questions.label: Are you taking any other medication other than the HIV medication?
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: If yes, how many tablets per day?
What other medication are you using? (Indicate in freetext)
Do you have any other illness other than HIV?
questions.questionInfo: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questionOptions.placeholder: Yes = 0 point. No = 1 point

questions.label: Activities of daily living (0-3 - Very dependent, 4-5- Moderately dependent, 6 - Independent):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(adlTotal) >= 0 && parseInt(adlTotal) <= 4 ? 'Very dependent' : parseInt(adlTotal) >= 4 && parseInt(adlTotal) <= 5 ? 'Moderately' : parseInt(adlTotal) === 6 ? 'Independent' : 'Unknown'

questions.label: Instrumental activities of daily living (0-5 - Dependent, 6-7 - Moderate, 8 - Independent):
Instrumental activities of daily living (0-4 - Dependent, 5-8 - Independent):
Cognitive decline ( 0-1 - Have cognitive decline, 2- No cognitive decline):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(cdTotal) >= 0 && parseInt(cdTotal) <=1 ? 'Have cognitive decline' : parseInt(cdTotal) === 2 ? 'No cognitive decline' : 'Unknown'

questions.label: Mobility (0-2 - Need medical attention, 3 - Patient okay):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(mobTotal) >= 0 && parseInt(mobTotal) <=2 ? 'Need medical attention' : parseInt(mobTotal) === 3 ? 'Patient okay' : 'Unknown'

questions.label: Mini Nutrition Assessment (0-2 - At risk of malnutrition, 3 - Normal nutritional status):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(mnaTotal) >= 0 && parseInt(mnaTotal) <=2 ? 'At risk of malnutrition' : parseInt(mnaTotal) === 3 ? 'Normal nutritional status' : 'Unknown'

questions.label: Visual ( 0 - Refer to eye specialist, 1 - Normal):
Hearing (0 - Refer to ENT specialist, 1- Normal):
Polypharmacy (0- Needs further assessment , 1- Patient okay):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(medication) === 0 ? 'Further assessment using BEERS tool' : parseInt(medication) === 1 ? 'Patient okay' : 'Unknown'

questions.label: Comorbidities ( 0- Needs attention and follow up, 1- Patient okay):

calculate.calculateExpression: parseInt(otherIllness) === 0 ? 'Needs attention and follow up' : parseInt(otherIllness) === 1 ? 'Patient okay' : 'Unknown'

validators.message: Return to clinic date should be greater than the encounter date.

questions.label: Please enter the clinical notes below:
